posts.author: 2025meli (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Specific value cell log when hovering over and pressing a specific key

What are you trying to achieve

When hovering over a value in a column and pressing CTRL (for example), it would show the previously available value (audit log), inc how it was, person changing it and date/time of change.
